com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXHarnessDiagramBundle

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXDiagramBaseInstance, IXDiagramBaseObject, IXDiagramCompoundObject, IXDiagramObject, IXHarnessDiagramObject, IXObject, IXWriteableObject

    public interface IXHarnessDiagramBundle
extends IXHarnessDiagramObject
     Interface to represent harness diagram bundle objects.

 This interface should be used for accessing the attributes of the associated harness bundle object.
 See AttributeList.html for the complete list of attributes available with this interface.

 NOTE: A value set for the OverriddenGraphicalLength attribute comes into affect only if the BundleLengthOverridden attribute is also set to true.
 Else, the GraphicalLength attribute value will be used.

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXDiagramObject

        getAbsoluteExtent, getRelativeExtent

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXWriteableObject

        getAttributeSetter

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXObject

        getAttribute, getAttributes, getBaseID, getID, getParentID, getProperties, getProperty, getSymbol, toHTML, toHTML

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXDiagramBaseInstance

        getConnectivity

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXDiagramCompoundObject

        getAssociatedObjects

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXDiagramBaseObject

        getDiagram, getZoneInfo
